bundles.title: DeFi Liquidation Intelligence
bundles.summary: Temporal liquidation-pressure, oracle-divergence, and composite-risk context for autonomous risk and execution systems.
why_agents_buy: Assess liquidation pressure before leverage-sensitive actions.
Use oracle divergence as an execution-caution input.
Detect worsening composite liquidation risk without parsing fragmented source feeds.
known_limitations: Signals are observational intelligence, not guaranteed liquidation outcomes.
The public preview does not expose paid signal values or detector internals.

bundles.title: Solana Temporal Intelligence
bundles.summary: Fresh Solana network-state intelligence for timing-sensitive transaction, routing, and infrastructure decisions.
why_agents_buy: Decide whether to act now, delay, retry, or reroute.
Check network conditions before submitting time-sensitive transactions.
Replace blind retry logic with current machine-readable telemetry.
known_limitations: RPC observations reflect the configured observation path.
The public preview intentionally omits paid telemetry and scoring depth.

bundles.title: XRPL Settlement Intelligence
bundles.summary: Validated-ledger progression and settlement-rail health for autonomous routing and monitoring systems.
why_agents_buy: Evaluate settlement confidence before routing value.
Monitor ledger progression and congestion state.
Use structured rail-health context instead of raw ledger polling alone.
known_limitations: Rail-health intelligence does not guarantee transaction settlement.
The public preview intentionally excludes paid settlement telemetry.

bundles.title: DeFi Flow Intelligence
bundles.summary: Cross-source DeFi liquidity, TVL, volume, fee, yield, and concentration context for autonomous allocation and monitoring.
why_agents_buy: Track where liquidity and activity are concentrating.
Improve allocation and routing decisions with normalized cross-source context.
Detect crowding or structural fragility without integrating every source independently.
known_limitations: Source availability can affect cross-source completeness.
The public preview intentionally omits paid concentration values and classifications.

bundles.title: XRP ETF Temporal Intelligence
bundles.summary: XRP market, XRPL, issuer-watch, holdings, flow, and claim-guardrail context for autonomous monitoring systems.
why_agents_buy: Monitor a high-noise domain with explicit claim guardrails.
Combine market, network, issuer, and flow context in one machine-readable payload.
Reduce false confidence around unsupported ETF-related claims.

source_provenance.role: upstream source set is not enumerated in public registry metadata

known_limitations: Public registry metadata does not enumerate every upstream ETF-related source.
The bundle does not claim approval or filing outcomes without observable evidence.
The public preview intentionally excludes paid issuer, holdings, and flow values.

bundles.title: Flare Temporal Intelligence
bundles.summary: Flare network, market, DeFi, and live FTSOv2 oracle context with explicit source-status guardrails.
measures: FLR market and DeFi TVL context
why_agents_buy: Monitor Flare network and oracle conditions together.
Use FTSOv2 proof-of-read context before oracle-sensitive actions.
Consume explicit source-health and intelligence-quality state.

source_provenance.role: network, market, DeFi, and FTSOv2 context

known_limitations: FAssets is reserved and is not claimed as live in version 1.2.
The public preview intentionally excludes paid oracle and temporal values.
